deviations.what: The RadioButtonGroup select is wired to a backend event; the original switched CSSGrid.gridAutoFlow (Column/ColumnDense/Row/RowDense) imperatively per selected index. The 'Reveal Grid' ToggleButton used a demo-only RevealGrid helper module (grid outline overlay) — reduced to a backend event.
grid:CSSGrid with gridAutoFlow + 10 VBox demo boxes, four carrying GridItemLayoutData row/column spans, 1:1.
